alternative_parents.description: Steroids containing a double bond between positions 4 and 5.
alternative_parents.name: Delta-4-steroids

alternative_parents.description: Acetals derived from ketones by replacement of the oxo group by two hydrocarbyloxy groups R2C(OR)2 ( R not Hydrogen ). This term, once abandoned, has been reinstated as a subclass of acetals.
alternative_parents.name: Ketals

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a dithioketal functional group with the general structure R2C(SR')2 with R, R' = organyl.
alternative_parents.name: Dithioketals

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing 1,3-dioxane, an aliphatic six-member ring with two oxygen atoms in ring positions 1 and 3.
alternative_parents.name: 1,3-dioxanes

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a 1,3-dithiolane ring. 1,3-dithiolane moiety is a 5-membered saturated aliphatic ring with three carbon atoms, and two sulfur atoms at the 1- and 3- ring positions.
alternative_parents.name: 1,3-dithiolanes

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds  in which a carbonyl group is bonded to two carbon atoms R2C=O (neither R may be a hydrogen atom). Ketones that have one or more alpha-hydrogen atoms undergo keto-enol tautomerization, the tautomer being an enol.
alternative_parents.name: Ketones

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an heterocycle with at least one oxygen atom linked to a ring carbon.
alternative_parents.name: Oxacyclic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organosulfur compounds containing a thioether group that is substituted by two alkyl groups.
alternative_parents.name: Dialkylthioethers

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an oxide group.
alternative_parents.name: Organic oxides

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

class.description: Compounds based on the cyclopenta[a]phenanthrene carbon skeleton, partially or completely hydrogenated; there are usually methyl groups at C-10 and C-13, and often an alkyl group at C-17. By extension, one or more bond scissions, ring expansions and/or ring contractions of the skeleton may have occurred.
class.name: Steroids and steroid derivatives

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as 11-oxosteroids. These are steroid derivatives carrying a C=O group at the 11-position of the steroid skeleton.

direct_parent.description: Steroid derivatives carrying a C=O group at the 11-position of the steroid skeleton.
direct_parent.name: 11-oxosteroids

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Steroid derivatives carrying a C=O group attached to steroid skeleton.
subclass.name: Oxosteroids

superclass.description: Fatty acids and their derivatives, and substances related biosynthetically or functionally to these compounds.
superclass.name: Lipids and lipid-like molecules
